backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the full backend with data stores for vendors, products, orders, reviews, reward campaigns, and projects, plus Stripe integration, access control, and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to add a `useGetVendorRatingSummary` React Query hook and update VendorCard, VendorStorePage, and VendorReviewsSection to use it instead of frontend-side aggregation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Concise per-file summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, key types, and notable implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/EXECUTION_PLAN.md: Staged development checklist tracking completed and planned frontend features across 11 stages from project setup through vendor reviews and rating summaries.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design token variables for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app, setting the page title to 'CitizensCo CAppStores Decentralized DApp Marketplace' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with all application routes, wrapping the layout with ThemeProvider, Header, Footer, StripeSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AddDAppModal.tsx: Modal dialog for adding a new DApp to the marketplace, collecting name, description, URL, category, and logo, then submitting via the useAddProjectEntry mutation.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard with tabs for overview, analytics, revenue, wallets, rewards, advertising, and system health, displaying aggregate stats from analytics and project entries.
frontend/src/components/CreateRewardCamp: Modal dialog for creating a new reward campaign with fields for name, description, type, and reward amount, submitting via the useCreateRewardCampaign mutation.
frontend/src/components/DAppCard.tsx: Card component that displays a DApp's name, description, views, and clicks, tracking views on mount and clicks on launch button press.
Static section displaying four platform feature cards (analytics, payments, AI recommendations, ads) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and navigation links for About, Docs, and Support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links (shop, orders, vendor, wallet, rewards, discovery, dashboard), theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Static hero banner with a gradient headline, subtitle, and three feature badge pills highlighting analytics, payments, and AI recommendations.
frontend/src/components/OrderConfirmatio: A modal dialog that displays order confirmation details (order ID, product, vendor, quantity, total in ICP, status) after a successful purchase, with options to continue shopping or navigate to the orders page.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailDialo: A modal dialog that fetches and displays detailed information for a specific order by ID, including status badge, product/vendor/customer IDs, quantity, total amount in ICP, and creation date.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: A card component that displays a product's name, vendor, description, price in ICP, and stock status, with quantity controls and an order button for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time profile setup that collects a required display name and optional email, validates inputs, and saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RecommendationsP: A panel that computes and displays up to three AI-scored project recommendations based on view/click analytics, highlighting hidden gems, new arrivals, and trending DApps.
frontend/src/components/RevenueDashboard: A dashboard component showing mock revenue metrics (total revenue, payouts, active configs) and a per-DApp revenue breakdown table using placeholder calculations.
frontend/src/components/RevenueShareConf: A modal dialog for configuring revenue share among participants, allowing users to add/remove participants with either a Principal ID or Stripe ID and a percentage, validating that totals equal 100% before saving.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupModal: A self-managing modal that auto-opens for admins when Stripe is not yet configured, allowing them to enter a secret key and allowed countries to set up payment processing.
An input component that supports both typed text and voice input via the Web Speech API, submitting the result via an onSubmit callback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/MyProduct: Displays a vendor's product list with loading skeletons and empty/error states, showing each product's name, description, price, and stock status.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorCat: A controlled input component for managing a list of vendor categories, supporting comma-separated entry, keyboard navigation of suggestions, duplicate detection, and badge-based removal.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOnb: A checklist card guiding new vendors through setup steps (create account, add first product), disappearing once all steps are complete.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: A form component for vendors to create new products, collecting name, description, price, and stock fields, then submitting via the useCreateProduct mutation with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorRev: Displays a vendor's reviews section including a star rating summary with breakdown bars, a list of existing reviews, and an authenticated form for submitting new star ratings and comments.
frontend/src/components/VendorCard.tsx: A clickable card component that displays a vendor's name, bio, categories, and star rating summary fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: A generic hook that returns a debounced version of a given value, only updating after a configurable delay (default 300ms) has elapsed without changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyVendorProducts.t: A hook that fetches all products and filters them by the given vendor ID, returning the filtered product list along with loading and error state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, providing queries and mutations for user profiles, admin checks, projects, analytics, reward campaigns, products, orders, vendors, reviews, and Stripe configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/DiscoveryHubPage.tsx: Displays a Discovery Hub page with AI-powered trending, emerging, and leaderboard sections for DApps, computed from project entries and analytics data. Requires authentication; shows a login prompt otherwise.
frontend/src/pages/GlobalDashboardPage.t: Renders a unified analytics dashboard showing global metrics (views, clicks, campaigns, reward pools) aggregated from analytics, project entries, and reward campaign data. Requires authentication to access.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Main marketplace page listing DApps with search, sort, and filter controls, along with modals for adding DApps, admin panel, and profile setup. Shows a hero/features landing section for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's order history in a table with status badges and click-to-open order detail dialog. Shows a login prompt if unauthenticated and a loading spinner while fetching.
frontend/src/pages/RewardsPage.tsx: Shows reward campaigns in a tabbed UI with cards for joining and completing campaigns, using icons and colors keyed by campaign type. Handles join/complete mutations with loading and completion states per campaign.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Displays a browsable product catalog with search and vendor filter controls, allowing authenticated users to place orders with confirmation dialog feedback.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDirectoryPage.t: Lists all public vendors with URL-synced search, category filter, and sort controls, collecting per-vendor ratings and navigating to individual vendor store pages.
frontend/src/pages/VendorPage.tsx: Vendor dashboard for the authenticated user to register as a vendor, manage their profile, products, orders, balance withdrawals, and view their reviews.
frontend/src/pages/VendorStorePage.tsx: Public storefront for a specific vendor showing their products, rating summary, and reviews, with order placement support for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx: Wallet management page displaying ICP and Stripe balances with deposit and withdrawal forms and a transaction history section.
frontend/src/types.ts: Defines and re-exports shared frontend TypeScript interfaces for analytics, revenue sharing, wallet, vendor, product, order, and review data structures.
frontend/src/utils/categoryText.ts: Utility functions for normalizing, comparing, parsing, and filtering vendor category strings with case-insensitive and whitespace-tolerant matching.
frontend/src/utils/errors.ts: Exports a `getReadableErrorMessage` utility that extracts a human-readable string from various error types including Error objects, strings, IC agent rejection objects, and plain objects.
frontend/src/utils/profileValidation.ts: Provides validation constants and functions (`validateName`, `validateEmail`, `validateProfile`) for user profile fields, matching backend constraints on length and email format.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/vendorDiscovery.ts: Provides helper functions for searching, filtering by category, sorting, and extracting unique categories from a list of Vendor objects.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing features (vendor rating summary React Query hook) and a pending backend feature request to add a `getVendorRatingSummary` query function.
